name: Kencana Agri Ltd. Registered Sh
summary: Kencana Agri Ltd. is an Indonesian-based company involved in the palm oil industry, focusing on cultivation, processing, and trading of palm oil and its related products, with operations primarily in Indonesia. It cultivates oil palm plantations, processes fresh fruit bunches into crude palm oil and palm kernel, and trades these products to both domestic and international markets. The company's registered office is in Singapore.
